title: Self Adhesive Hooks, 12 Pack Strong Sticky Small Round White Wall Hooks for Hanging, Kitchen, Bathroom, Keys, Utensils & Home Decor No Drilling
features: Superior Adhesive | Our self adhesive hooks feature a premium, industrial-grade bonding agent engineered for a powerful, long-lasting hold. Reliable wall hooks, designed to securely hold up to 1kg on smooth surfaces like tiles, glass, and smooth walls.
Elegant & Discreet Design | These small white hooks are made of premium ABS. Small, white, and minimalist. Blends seamlessly into your home decor for invisible organising.

Endlessly Versatile | Perfect as kitchen hooks for utensils and tea towels, a key holder for the wall, or bathroom towel hooks. They also excel as a cable tidy behind your desk or for hanging lightweight fairy lights and seasonal decorations.
Damage-free & No Drilling | Simply peel the backing, press firmly onto a clean, dry surface and stick for instant organization. Leaves no marks or holes behind.
A Complete Organizing Pack | Your pack includes 12 premium adhesive hooks, ready to tackle clutter hotspots around your home.
description: Product Description Effortless Order, Elegant Design The small messes of daily life create the biggest stress. Our small, elegant hooks are the simple answer. Instantly create order out of chaos and give everything from keys to tea towels its proper place, all without reaching for a single tool. Your Home’s Most Versatile Helper One Solution for a Hundred Small Problems. From a key holder by the door to a utensil rack in the kitchen or a towel hook in the bathroom, their minimalist, water-resistant design makes them the perfect organising tool for every single room in your home. Small Hook, Mighty Performance Elegant & Discreet. Our hooks feature a minimalist 3.4cm round design in a clean white finish. Crafted from durable ABS, they blend seamlessly into any decor, from your modern kitchen to your cosy bedroom. Powerful & Reliable. Don’t be fooled by their size. Each hook uses an industrial-grade adhesive to create a long-lasting bond, confidently holding up to 1kg. EFFORTLESS PEEL & STICK SETUP NO TOOLS, NO NAILS Put away the drill and forget about wall damage. Installation is foolproof: simply clean the surface, peel the backing, and press the hook firmly for 30 seconds. The Simple Fix Our hooks provide an instant, satisfying solution, turning messy surfaces into models of efficiency. They provide the function you need without creating visual noise, proving that practical items can also be stylish. About us We specialise in finding the small, clever things that solve real household problems. In a world of endless choice, we focus on what truly works. We believe the right tool, no matter how small, makes all the difference. We’re passionate about discovering those thoughtfully designed, genuinely useful items that bring ease and quality to your everyday tasks and hobbies. BYSMAH Small Round Sticky Hooks Specifications: Size: 3.4*3.4*2.2cm Material: Durable ABS Colour: White Capacity: Up to 1KG Quantity: 6/12Pcs
